problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type may resolve Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
